nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 秘鲁
nodes.summary: 秘鲁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联962种鸟类，包括北山䳍、高山斑䳍、丽色斑䳍等962种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Peruvian antpitta
nodes.summary: Peruvian antpitta（Peruvian antpitta，学名 Grallaricula peruviana），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于厄瓜多尔、秘鲁，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔
nodes.summary: 厄瓜多尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联857种鸟类，包括安第斯斑䳍、红头林䳍、灰䳍等857种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Ecuador and Peru

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Ecuador and Peru

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The only threat known to this species is the loss and degradation of its forested habitat for conversion to agriculture and cattle pasture, mining operations and logging." It is considered "rare and local" in Ecuador and "presumably secretive and rare" in Peru. "[I]t appears that this species is confined to mature forest, often close to riparian areas, and any activities which threaten such habitat within their range are likely threats."
